provenance.author: Gemini Code Assist
provenance.context: A semantic capsule describing the technical specification for ChronoSCRIBE.

intent.primary_goal: To provide the detailed technical specification for the ChronoSCRIBE audit ledger, including its data structures, cryptographic methods, and verification process.

identity.role: The canonical technical specification for the project's provenance and audit system.

priorities: The ledger is an append-only NDJSON file.
Each record contains a header (ID, timestamp, eventType, prev_hash) and a signed payload.
The hash chain is constructed using SHA-256 on the canonical JSON representation of the previous record.
Verification involves re-calculating the hash chain and validating every signature from genesis to head.

file_scope.purpose: To serve as the definitive technical reference for implementing, maintaining, and verifying the ChronoSCRIBE ledger.

key_concepts.ndjson: The newline-delimited JSON format used for the append-only ledger file.
key_concepts.ed25519: The digital signature algorithm used to ensure authenticity.
key_concepts.sha256: The hashing algorithm used to create the tamper-evident chain.
key_concepts.canonical_json: A strict, deterministic JSON serialization format required for consistent hashing.

trust.note: This capsule is the authoritative technical specification for the ChronoSCRIBE system. It defines the core of the project's trust model.
